subject: math
activity_templates: A kindergarten picture-addition worksheet. Four problems, each with two groups of cute cartoon objects and a '+' between them, and a box for the child to write the total. Sums stay within 10. {{character}} cheers next to the first problem.
A kindergarten addition-within-10 worksheet with 6 number-only problems in big clear numbers (e.g. '3 + 2 = __'). Header reads 'Add It Up!'. {{character}} holds a pencil in the top corner.
A kindergarten number-bond worksheet. Three number bonds showing parts-of-10 (e.g. part 3, part ?, total 10) for the child to fill the missing part. {{character}} stands in the middle.
A kindergarten count-on addition worksheet with a number line 0-10. Four problems, each asking the child to 'count on' starting from a number and draw jumps. {{character}} hops along the line.
